reviews.author: Amir Hakim
reviews.text: Best riding gear brand in Malaysia hands down. The mesh jacket is perfect for our weather — bought it a year ago and still going strong.

reviews.author: Zulaikha Noor
reviews.text: Love the design and quality. Finally a local brand that actually understands rider culture. Will be ordering the new drop for sure.

reviews.author: Jeffry Tan
reviews.text: The graphic tees are fire. Wore mine to a muster and got so many compliments. Size guide is accurate too — no complaints.

reviews.author: Razif Adzha
reviews.text: Good quality for the price. The jacket runs slightly large but customer support helped me sort out the exchange quickly.

reviews.author: Nurul Ain
reviews.text: Ordered the polo and the cap together — both arrived within 3 days. Packaging was nice and the quality is top notch.

reviews.author: Harith Syafiq
reviews.text: Syndicate represents the riding community perfectly. The gloves are comfortable and the grip is great. Will be buying the jacket next.

reviews.author: Darwisyah K.
reviews.text: Super comfortable for long rides. The material is breathable and the fit is perfect under the helmet. Would recommend.

reviews.author: Faris Izwan
reviews.text: Clean design, solid quality. The beanie is warm without being too thick. Great for early morning rides.
